emails.subject: Re: Delta/Salmon
emails.body: No, I just glossed over it. I am a speed reader... I only read every other word. When do you want us to come up? Kay Mann@ENRON 05/01/2001 07:55 AM

emails.subject: Re: Delta/Salmon
emails.body: 11 should be fine. Jake called. He wants to go to dinner tomorrow. Actually, he wants Ben to take us to dinner (I am going to invite Ben). The list includes: You Me Caroline Carlos Jake Ben Fred Can you make it and ask Caroline if she can make it? Can you think of anyone else? Does Pappas Steakhouse sound OK? Kay Mann@ENRON 05/01/2001 08:03 AM

emails.subject: Re: Delta/Salmon
emails.body: Re: Delta/Salmon Kay, Do the retainage LOC's flow from the receipt of funds letter, or do we need to tee up those separately? Steve Kay Mann@ENRON 05/01/2001 06:59 AM

emails.subject: Re: Delta/Salmon
emails.body: I've asked for it separately (second item below). Did I misunderstand your question? I'm setting up a table with all the stuff for signature now. Kay Stephen Thome@ECT 05/01/2001 09:53 AM

emails.subject: Re: Delta/Salmon
emails.body: Kathleen is coming up to help me set up. How about 11? If you see Kathleen, can you give her the membership certificates? I'll have a stack for Duran later. Kay Stephen Thome@ECT 05/01/2001 09:59 AM

emails.body: I'm supposed to go to the law conference tomorrow evening. Stephen Thome@ECT 05/01/2001 10:19 AM
